---
title: "Diff Expression"
author: "Rebekah Sheih"
date: "2026-04-28"
output:
  html_document:
    fig_width: 6
    fig_height: 4
    dpi: 200
---

```{r}
library(GenomicFeatures)

gtf_file <- "/Users/rebekahsheih/Desktop/pxl_rnaseq/gencode.v49.annotation.gtf"

# build transcript database from GTF
txdb <- makeTxDbFromGFF(gtf_file, format = "gtf")

# extract transcript → gene mapping
tx2gene <- transcripts(txdb, columns = c("tx_name", "gene_id"))

tx2gene <- as.data.frame(tx2gene)[, c("tx_name", "gene_id")]

colnames(tx2gene) <- c("TXNAME", "GENEID")

# IMPORTANT: remove version numbers (critical for Salmon matching)
tx2gene$TXNAME <- gsub("\\..*", "", tx2gene$TXNAME)
tx2gene$GENEID <- gsub("\\..*", "", tx2gene$GENEID)

# save it for your pipeline
write.csv(tx2gene, "tx2gene.csv", row.names = FALSE)

head(tx2gene)
```

# First pass at DEseq to quantify differential gene expression of the chr17 aligned reads.


```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```


```{r, quiet=TRUE, echo=FALSE, message=FALSE}

if (!require("tximport")) {
  install.packages("tximport")}

if (!require("readr")) {
  install.packages("readr")}

if (!require("ggplot2", quietly = TRUE))
  install.packages("BiocManager")
BiocManager::install("ggplot2")

if (!require("DESeq2", quietly = TRUE))
  BiocManager::install("DESeq2")

if (!require("ggrepel", quietly = TRUE))
  BiocManager::install("ggrepel")

if (!require("tximport", quietly = TRUE))
  BiocManager::install("tximport")

if (!require("GenomicFeatures", quietly = TRUE))
  BiocManager::install("GenomicFeatures")

if (!require("txdbmaker", quietly = TRUE))
  BiocManager::install("txdbmaker")

```

```{r}
library(tximport)
library(txdbmaker)
library(readr)
library(here)
library(DESeq2)
library(ggrepel)
library(GenomicFeatures)
```



# import salmon count files.
```{r}

# we import the salmon count files in the directory "salmon_quant"

salmon_dir <- here("salmon_quant")

```


```{r five}
# List all the quantification files
files <- list.files(salmon_dir, pattern = "quant.sf", recursive = TRUE, full.names = TRUE)

# Extract sample names from the file paths
sample_names <- sapply(strsplit(files, "/"), function(x) x[length(x)-1])

# Create a named vector of file paths
names(files) <- sample_names

# Import a transcript to gene table.
tx2gene <- read.csv("tx2gene.csv", header = TRUE)
head(tx2gene)

# Import the quantification data
txi <- tximport(
  files,
  type = "salmon",
  tx2gene = tx2gene,
  ignoreTxVersion = TRUE
)

# Extract the counts matrix
counts_matrix <- txi$counts

# Save the counts matrix to a file
write.csv(counts_matrix, file = here("salmon_quant_matrix.csv"), row.names = TRUE)

```

```{r six}

# Load the count matrix
count_data <- read.csv(here("salmon_quant_matrix.csv"), row.names = 1)


# View the first few rows of the count data
head(count_data)
```


```{r seven}
# Load the metadata
# metadata <- read.csv(here("meta_smarce1_17.csv"))

samples <- colnames(count_data)

metadata <- data.frame(
  condition = ifelse(grepl("U2OS", samples), "WT", "PMLKO")
)

rownames(metadata) <- samples
metadata$condition <- factor(metadata$condition)

```

``` {r eight}
# Ensure the sample names in metadata match the column names in count data
# Replace hyphens with periods in the Run column
# metadata$Run <- gsub("-", ".", metadata$Run)
# rownames(metadata) <- metadata$Run

# Check if the metadata matches the count data
all(rownames(metadata) %in% colnames(count_data))  # Should return TRUE


```


```{r}

# Round the count data to integers
count_data <- round(count_data)

# Create the DESeqDataSet object
dds <- DESeqDataSetFromMatrix(
    countData = count_data,
    colData = metadata,
    design = ~ condition  # Design formula: compare by 'condition' (WT vs PMLKO)
)

# Run DESeq2
dds <- DESeq(dds)

# Extract results for the comparison of deltaL vs WT
res <- results(dds, contrast = c("condition", "PMLKO", "WT"))

# remove large objects (just because they are big)
rm(dds, txi, count_data, counts_matrix)
ls()

# View the results
head(res)


# Save the results to a file

system("mkdir -p ./out")
write.csv(as.data.frame(res), file = (here("out","deseq2_results.csv")))

```
## MA plot
```{r MA}

# Create an MA plot
system("mkdir -p ./out/plots")

pdf("./out/plots/MA.pdf")
plotMA(res, main = "MA Plot", ylim = c(-5, 5))
dev.off()

```

## Basic Volcano plot
```{r volcano}


# add "category" column for upregulated, downregulated, not significant.
df <- as.data.frame(res)
df$category <- "Not significant"
df$category[df$padj < 0.05 & df$log2FoldChange > 1] <- "Upregulated"
df$category[df$padj < 0.05 & df$log2FoldChange < -1] <- "Downregulated"
df$category <- factor(df$category, 
                      levels = c("Downregulated", "Not significant", "Upregulated"))

# Create a volcano plot

pdf("./out/plots/volcano.pdf")

ggplot(df, aes(x = log2FoldChange, y = -log10(padj))) +
    geom_point(aes(color = category), alpha = 0.7) +
    scale_color_manual(values = c(
        "Downregulated" = "blue",
        "Not significant" = "gray",
        "Upregulated" = "red"
    )) +
    labs(
        title = "Volcano Plot",
        x = "Log2 Fold Change",
        y = "-Log10 Adjusted P-value",
        color = "Gene regulation"
    ) +
    theme_minimal()

dev.off()
```
